Properties.Definition:
# Employee Timesheet Management System - GraphQL Schema

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Enums
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

enum UserType {
  superadmin
  admin
  user
}

enum Role {
  Project_Manager
  Tech_Lead
  Employee
}

enum SubmissionStatus {
  Draft
  Submitted
  Approved
  Rejected
  Locked
}

enum ApprovalStatus {
  Pending_Approval
  Approved
  Rejected
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

type User {
  userId: ID!
  email: String!
  fullName: String!
  userType: UserType!
  role: Role!
  positionId: ID!
  departmentId: ID!
  supervisorId: ID
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  createdBy: ID
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type Department {
  departmentId: ID!
  departmentName: String!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  createdBy: ID
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type Position {
  positionId: ID!
  positionName: String!
  description: String
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  createdBy: ID
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type Project {
  projectId: ID!
  projectCode: String!
  projectName: String!
  startDate: AWSDate!
  plannedHours: Float!
  projectManagerId: ID!
  status: String!
  approval_status: ApprovalStatus!
  rejectionReason: String
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  createdBy: ID
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type TimesheetPeriod {
  periodId: ID!
  startDate: AWSDate!
  endDate: AWSDate!
  submissionDeadline: AWSDateTime!
  periodString: String!
  biweeklyPeriodId: String
  isLocked: Boolean!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  createdBy: ID
}

type TimesheetSubmission {
  submissionId: ID!
  periodId: ID!
  employeeId: ID!
  status: SubmissionStatus!
  archived: Boolean!
  entries: [TimesheetEntry!]!
  totalHours: Float!
  chargeableHours: Float!
  approvedBy: ID
  approvedAt: AWSDateTime
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type TimesheetEntry {
  entryId: ID!
  submissionId: ID!
  projectCode: String!
  saturday: Float!
  sunday: Float!
  monday: Float!
  tuesday: Float!
  wednesday: Float!
  thursday: Float!
  friday: Float!
  totalHours: Float!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
}

type EmployeePerformance {
  userId: ID!
  year: Int!
  ytdChargable_hours: Float!
  ytdTotalHours: Float!
  ytdChargabilityPercentage: Float!
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
}

type MainDatabaseRecord {
  recordId: ID!
  type: String!
  chargeCode: String!
  projectName: String!
  budgetEffort: Float!
  projectStatus: String!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type ReportDownloadUrl {
  url: String!
  expiresAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type BulkImportResult {
  totalRows: Int!
  successCount: Int!
  failureCount: Int!
  errors: [ImportError!]!
}

type ImportError {
  row: Int!
  message: String!
}

type RefreshResult {
  recordsImported: Int!
  previousRecordsRemoved: Int!
  timestamp: AWSDateTime!
}

type ReportDistributionConfig {
  configId: ID!
  schedule_cron_expression: String!
  recipient_emails: [String!]!
  enabled: Boolean!
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime
  updatedBy: ID
}

type UserConnection {
  items: [User!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type ProjectConnection {
  items: [Project!]!
  nextToken: String
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Input Types
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

input CreateUserInput {
  email: String!
  fullName: String!
  userType: UserType!
  role: Role!
  positionId: ID!
  departmentId: ID!
  supervisorId: ID
}

input UpdateUserInput {
  email: String
  fullName: String
  userType: UserType
  role: Role
  positionId: ID
  departmentId: ID
  supervisorId: ID
}

input UserFilterInput {
  userType: UserType
  role: Role
  departmentId: ID
  supervisorId: ID
  nextToken: String
  limit: Int
}

input CreateDepartmentInput {
  departmentName: String!
}

input UpdateDepartmentInput {
  departmentName: String!
}

input CreatePositionInput {
  positionName: String!
  description: String
}

input UpdatePositionInput {
  positionName: String
  description: String
}

input CreateProjectInput {
  projectCode: String!
  projectName: String!
  startDate: AWSDate!
  plannedHours: Float!
  projectManagerId: ID!
}

input UpdateProjectInput {
  projectName: String
  startDate: AWSDate
  plannedHours: Float
  projectManagerId: ID
  status: String
}

input ProjectFilterInput {
  approval_status: ApprovalStatus
  projectManagerId: ID
  status: String
  nextToken: String
  limit: Int
}

input CreateTimesheetPeriodInput {
  startDate: AWSDate!
  endDate: AWSDate!
  submissionDeadline: AWSDateTime!
  periodString: String!
  biweeklyPeriodId: String
}

input UpdateTimesheetPeriodInput {
  submissionDeadline: AWSDateTime
  periodString: String
  biweeklyPeriodId: String
}

input TimesheetEntryInput {
  projectCode: String!
  saturday: Float!
  sunday: Float!
  monday: Float!
  tuesday: Float!
  wednesday: Float!
  thursday: Float!
  friday: Float!
}

input SubmissionFilterInput {
  periodId: ID
  status: SubmissionStatus
}

input PeriodFilterInput {
  startDate: AWSDate
  endDate: AWSDate
  isLocked: Boolean
}

input S3ObjectInput {
  bucket: String!
  key: String!
}

input UpdateMainDBInput {
  type: String
  chargeCode: String
  projectName: String
  budgetEffort: Float
  projectStatus: String
}

input UpdateReportDistributionConfigInput {
  schedule_cron_expression: String
  recipient_emails: [String]
  enabled: Boolean
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Queries
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

type Query {
  getUser(userId: ID!): User
  listUsers(filter: UserFilterInput): UserConnection!
  listDepartments: [Department!]!
  listPositions: [Position!]!
  listProjects(filter: ProjectFilterInput): ProjectConnection!
  getCurrentPeriod: TimesheetPeriod
  listTimesheetPeriods(filter: PeriodFilterInput): [TimesheetPeriod!]!
  getTimesheetSubmission(submissionId: ID!): TimesheetSubmission!
  listMySubmissions(filter: SubmissionFilterInput): [TimesheetSubmission!]!
  listPendingTimesheets: [TimesheetSubmission!]!
  getTCSummaryReport(techLeadId: ID!, periodId: ID!): ReportDownloadUrl!
  getProjectSummaryReport(periodId: ID!): ReportDownloadUrl!
  listMainDatabase: [MainDatabaseRecord!]!
  getReportDistributionConfig: ReportDistributionConfig
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Mutations
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

type Mutation {
  createUser(input: CreateUserInput!): User!
  updateUser(userId: ID!, input: UpdateUserInput!): User!
  deleteUser(userId: ID!): Boolean!
  createDepartment(input: CreateDepartmentInput!): Department!
  updateDepartment(departmentId: ID!, input: UpdateDepartmentInput!): Department!
  deleteDepartment(departmentId: ID!): Boolean!
  createPosition(input: CreatePositionInput!): Position!
  updatePosition(positionId: ID!, input: UpdatePositionInput!): Position!
  deletePosition(positionId: ID!): Boolean!
  createProject(input: CreateProjectInput!): Project!
  approveProject(projectId: ID!): Project!
  rejectProject(projectId: ID!, reason: String!): Project!
  updateProject(projectId: ID!, input: UpdateProjectInput!): Project!
  createTimesheetPeriod(input: CreateTimesheetPeriodInput!): TimesheetPeriod!
  updateTimesheetPeriod(periodId: ID!, input: UpdateTimesheetPeriodInput!): TimesheetPeriod!
  createTimesheetSubmission(periodId: ID!): TimesheetSubmission!
  submitTimesheet(submissionId: ID!): TimesheetSubmission!
  addTimesheetEntry(submissionId: ID!, input: TimesheetEntryInput!): TimesheetEntry!
  updateTimesheetEntry(entryId: ID!, input: TimesheetEntryInput!): TimesheetEntry!
  removeTimesheetEntry(entryId: ID!): Boolean!
  approveTimesheet(submissionId: ID!): TimesheetSubmission!
  rejectTimesheet(submissionId: ID!): TimesheetSubmission!
  updateMainDatabaseRecord(id: ID!, input: UpdateMainDBInput!): MainDatabaseRecord!
  bulkImportCSV(file: S3ObjectInput!): BulkImportResult!
  refreshDatabase(file: S3ObjectInput!): RefreshResult!
  updateReportDistributionConfig(input: UpdateReportDistributionConfigInput!): ReportDistributionConfig!
}

Properties.Description: Triggers deadline enforcement Lambda to lock expired timesheet periods
Properties.Name: TimesheetDeadlineEnforcement-staging

Properties.Description: Triggers notification Lambda to generate and email timesheet reports
Properties.Name: TimesheetNotification-staging

Properties.Description: Triggers archival Lambda to archive submissions for ended biweekly periods
Properties.Name: TimesheetArchival-staging

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
